title: ICIIP -2011
content: 2011 IEEE International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP -2011) November 3 - 5, 2011 Jaypee University of Information Technology Waknaghat, Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA The proceedings have been published by the IEEE and the same have been included in IEEE Xplore IEEE Conference Record number: 18223 IEEE Catalogue number:  CFP1169N-PRT ;   ISBN: 978-1-61284-859-4 ( Print Version) IEEE Catalogue number:    CFP1169N-CDR ;    ISBN: 978-1-61284-860-0 (CD-ROM Version) The Paper Submission  for 2011 IEEE ICIIP  is CLOSED The International Conference on Image Information Processing � ICIIP 2011  has been organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat near Shimla. The objective of the conference is to bring together researchers in the academic institutions and R&D Research Labs, working in the related fields and to use this as a forum to exchange views and ideas in these topics of current research. Original contributions are solicited for presentation at  the International Conference on Image Information Processing (ICIIP - 2011)  to be held at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat www.juit.ac.in The topics of interest include (but are not limited to) the following : Technical Tracks : Image Processing Computer Vision Pattern Recognition Image Watermarking Image and Video Compression Image Restoration Image  Forensics Image and Video Processing Architecture Image-Based Rendering Content-Based Image Retrieval Document Image Processing Bio-Medical Imaging Biometric Image Processing Computational and Statistical Methods Parallel Image Processing Motion and Video Analysis Sensors, Imaging model and Simulation Video Forensics Computer Graphics Data Mining Stereo Vision 3D Shape and Structure Analysis 3D Modeling and Visualization Pattern Analysis and Recognition Satellite Data Analysis and Interpretation Animation and Motion Robotics Robot Vision Wavelet Image Processing For more details, click here All Papers accepted & presented in ICIIP - 2011 will be published by IEEE and they will be included and indexed in IEEE Xplore. Important Dates Paper Submission (Revised) 14 July, 2011 (CLOSED) Acceptance Notification Deadline 14 August, 2011 Camera-Ready Manuscript Deadline 1 September, 2011 Conference Registration Deadline 15 September, 2011 Conference Dates 03– 05 November , 2011 Organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA www.juit.ac.in
